title.en: China-to-Gambia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入冈比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入甘比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against The Gambia Standards Bureau conformity context, PURA renewable-energy and electricity licensing oversight, NAWEC grid-connection practice, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface expectations, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, off-grid IEC TS 62257 and VeraSol procurement context, and China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与冈比亚标准局合格评定背景、PURA可再生能源及电力许可监管、NAWEC并网实践、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口要求、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、离网IEC TS 62257和VeraSol采购背景，以及中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與甘比亞標準局合格評定背景、PURA再生能源及電力許可監管、NAWEC併網實務、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面要求、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、離網IEC TS 62257和VeraSol採購背景，以及中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TGSB conformity scope determination, PURA licence decision, NAWEC grid-connection approval, customs determination, donor procurement approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, EPC contractors, and installers should verify current TGSB standards and conformity procedures, PURA electricity and renewable-energy licensing requirements, NAWEC connection conditions, project-owner requirements, and donor or lender specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TGSB合格评定范围裁定、PURA许可决定、NAWEC并网批准、海关裁定、捐助方采购批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、EPC承包商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行TGSB标准和合格评定程序、PURA电力及可再生能源许可要求、NAWEC接入条件、项目业主要求及捐助方或贷款方规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TGSB合格評定範圍裁定、PURA許可決定、NAWEC併網批准、海關裁定、捐助方採購批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、EPC承包商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行TGSB標準和合格評定程序、PURA電力及再生能源許可要求、NAWEC接入條件、項目業主要求及捐助方或貸款方規格。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to The Gambia, the practical gaps are: (1) confirming TGSB conformity or standards-mark expectations for the exact product route; (2) confirming PURA licensing or approval implications for grid-connected renewable-energy generation; (3) obtaining NAWEC project-specific grid-connection acceptance for 50 Hz 230/400 V conditions; (4) supplementing China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence with IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920, and IEC 61000 evidence where required; and (5) documenting humid, dusty West-African operating assumptions, derating, ingress protection, corrosion protection, and donor or lender procurement specifications. Chinese domestic certificates are useful background but should not be treated as automatically accepted in The Gambia.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口冈比亚时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认具体产品路径下TGSB合格评定或标准标志要求；（2）确认并网可再生能源发电涉及的PURA许可或批准要求；（3）针对50 Hz 230/400 V条件取得NAWEC项目级并网接受；（4）在需要时以IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727、IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据补充中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据；（5）记录西非高湿、多尘运行假设、降额、防护等级、防腐保护及捐助方或贷款方采购规格。中国国内证书可作为背景材料，但不应视为在冈比亚自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口甘比亞時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認具體產品路徑下TGSB合格評定或標準標誌要求；（2）確認併網再生能源發電涉及的PURA許可或批准要求；（3）針對50 Hz 230/400 V條件取得NAWEC項目級併網接受；（4）在需要時以IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727、IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據補充中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據；（5）記錄西非高濕、多塵運行假設、降額、防護等級、防腐保護及捐助方或貸款方採購規格。中國國內證書可作為背景材料，但不應視為在甘比亞自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
